info.title: SkyShield Edu API
info.description:
SkyShield Educational Platform API - Your gateway to cybersecurity training.

## 🔐 Authentication
All endpoints (except login/register) require JWT Bearer token authentication.
Click the Authorize button and enter: `Bearer <your_token>`

post.description:
Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

AchievementTypeEnum.description:
* `first_completion` - First Completion
* `perfect_score` - Perfect Score
* `speed_demon` - Speed Demon
* `no_hints` - No Hints Used
* `multiple_attempts` - Persistent Learner

AuditActionEnum.description:
* `CREATE` - Create
* `UPDATE` - Update
* `DELETE` - Delete
* `VIEW` - View
* `LOGIN` - Login
* `LOGOUT` - Logout
* `EXPORT` - Export
* `IMPORT` - Import

CategoryEnum.description:
* `communication` - Communication
* `navigation` - Navigation
* `data_integrity` - Data Integrity
* `social_engineering` - Social Engineering
* `ransomware` - Ransomware
* `unauthorized_access` - Unauthorized Access

DataTypeEnum.description:
* `string` - String
* `integer` - Integer
* `float` - Float
* `boolean` - Boolean
* `json` - JSON
* `list` - List

ExerciseTypeEnum.description:
* `multiple_choice` - Multiple Choice
* `fill_blanks` - Fill in the Blanks
* `matching` - Matching
* `scenario` - Scenario Based

FeedbackRatingEnum.description:
* `1` - Poor
* `2` - Fair
* `3` - Good
* `4` - Very Good
* `5` - Excellent

LearningMaterialMaterialTypeEnum.description:
* `article` - Article
* `video` - Video
* `document` - Document
* `quiz` - Quiz
* `simulation` - Simulation
* `audio` - Audio
* `presentation` - Presentation
* `link` - External Link
* `other` - Other

ParticipantStatusEnum.description:
* `invited` - Invited
* `waiting` - In Waiting Room
* `joining` - Joining
* `connected` - Connected
* `disconnected` - Disconnected
* `rejected` - Rejected

username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.

PlatformEnum.description:
* `google_meet` - Google Meet
* `zoom` - Zoom
* `teams` - Microsoft Teams
* `custom` - Custom Link
* `internal` - Internal Meeting

SimulationSessionStatusEnum.description:
* `not_started` - Not Started
* `in_progress` - In Progress
* `completed` - Completed
* `failed` - Failed
* `abandoned` - Abandoned

SkillEnum.description:
* `threat_detection` - Threat Detection
* `incident_response` - Incident Response
* `risk_assessment` - Risk Assessment
* `communication` - Communication Security
* `navigation` - Navigation Security

TeachingSessionTypeEnum.description:
* `live` - Live Session
* `recorded` - Recorded Session
* `workshop` - Workshop
* `qanda` - Q&A Session

ThreatTypeEnum.description:
* `jamming` - Communication Jamming
* `gps_spoofing` - GPS Spoofing
* `atc_access` - Unauthorized ATC Access
* `data_corruption` - Data Corruption
* `phishing` - Phishing
* `ransomware` - Ransomware
* `dos` - Denial of Service
* `man_in_middle` - Man in the Middle

TypeEnum.description:
* `info` - Information
* `warning` - Warning
* `success` - Success
* `error` - Error
* `achievement` - Achievement
* `meeting` - Meeting
* `invitation` - Meeting Invitation
* `recording` - Recording Available

UserActivityTypeEnum.description:
* `login` - Login
* `logout` - Logout
* `login_failed` - Login Failed
* `password_change` - Password Changed
* `password_reset` - Password Reset
* `email_verify` - Email Verified
* `profile_update` - Profile Updated
* `simulation_start` - Simulation Started
* `simulation_complete` - Simulation Completed
* `simulation_abandon` - Simulation Abandoned
* `content_view` - Content Viewed
* `certificate_earned` - Certificate Earned
* `achievement_unlocked` - Achievement Unlocked
* `two_factor_enabled` - 2FA Enabled
* `two_factor_disabled` - 2FA Disabled
* `meeting_created` - Meeting Created
* `meeting_joined` - Meeting Joined
* `meeting_left` - Meeting Left
* `meeting_ended` - Meeting Ended
* `screen_shared` - Screen Shared
* `recording_started` - Recording Started
* `chat_message` - Chat Message
* `meeting_invitation_sent` - Meeting Invitation Sent
* `meeting_invitation_accepted` - Meeting Invitation Accepted
* `meeting_invitation_declined` - Meeting Invitation Declined
